mapper.insert: insert into forumComment(postId, userId, parentId, content) values (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content})
mapper.update: update forumComment set likeCount = likeCount + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 1
mapper.select:
select * from forumComment
and content like concat('%',#{content},'%')
select * from forumComment where postId = #{postId} and status = 1
select * from forumComment where id = #{id} and status = 1
